changes: Rewrote Skills page presentation to match screenshot 19-fundamentos.png: replaced old Header with ScreenHeader (back + subtitle 'Configurar avaliação') + IconButton (plus) on right; added info card (white rounded-14 shadow-sm with green Info icon and explanatory text about Avaliação rápida / equilíbrio dos times); added ESCALA DE AVALIAÇÃO section label with Segmented control (1 a 3 / 1 a 5 / 1 a 10); restructured skill rows into white grouped cards (rounded-14 shadow-sm overflow-hidden) with GripVertical drag handle, 15px semibold label (italic+fg-4 when inactive), Switch toggle, and optional weight badge (green-50 pill with x1.0 format); section headers use uppercase 11px font-body bold tracking-05em fg-3 matching er-grouplabel; TÉCNICOS header has 'Mostrar pesos' toggle (two-line label) on the right; preserved all hooks (useSkillsConfig, useSkillsConfigMutations), state, mutations (toggleActive, changeWeight, move, addSkill), Sheet for adding new skill, FullPageSpinner loading state, and inline weight slider when showWeights is on.
